title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : North East District Council (public Standpipes) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : North East District Council (public Standpipes) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-Laws may be cited as the North East District Council (Public Standpipes) Bye-Laws*.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: the Council Secretary, or any person authorised by him under bye-law 3
